hero.title: Find companies you'd like to work for.
hero.description: Browse companies by country, discover opportunities, and access their careers pages directly.

items.title: Search companies by country
items.description: Quickly find companies based on the location you're interested in.

items.title: Explore different categories
items.description: Filter by company type and discover new options.

items.title: Access their careers pages directly
items.description: Apply without intermediaries through each company's official careers page.

features.intro: I created this platform because finding specific companies by country was frustrating and scattered.
features.outro: I wanted a simple place where everything is organized and easy to explore.

community.title: This directory grows with the community.
community.description: If you know an interesting company, feel free to suggest it.

about.title: I'm Alfonso Gonzalez, a frontend-focused web developer.
about.description: I built this project to practice and solve a real problem I personally faced.
about.note: I'm always open to feedback and new ideas.

companies.title: Companies
companies.description: Explore companies by category and country. Use the filters to quickly find the most relevant options.
